title: ligusticum pyrenaeum subsp. huteri
intro: Ligusticum pyrenaeum subsp. huteri, also known as Pyrenean Lovage or Mountain Lovage, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to the Pyrenees mountains between France and Spain. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ligusticum pyrenaeum subsp. huteri include its use as a natural remedy for various gastrointestinal issues, such as bloating, gas, and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Ligusticum pyrenaeum subsp. huteri is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
